$comment: Repo-local command map for the Guidaro site (German-language DACH sales-consulting agency, package 'guidaro-sales'). Babysitter processes invoked from this CWD read this for quality gates and deploy.

qualityGate.$comment: Default gate for implement-feature.js / fix-bug.js on the Guidaro site. Site has no test runner; gate is lint + astro check (typecheck) + build.
qualityGate.firstTimeSetup: npm install   # installs the Astro + ESLint + wrangler stack on first run

brandCheck.$comment: Optional copy-changes gate for the Guidaro site. Invoke the brand-voice-reviewer agent on changed German page/component copy against this repo's LOCAL brand (docs/brand/brand-guidelines.md) — Guidaro, NOT Voxera.
